TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Cibarbaran ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Karing Si, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,593 buwan, 4,544 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 11% kyan ku 514 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 89% kyan ku 4,030 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 9%, Truku 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cibarbaran hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Cibarbaran hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Cibarbaran hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cibarbaran hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cibarbaran hya' ga Cipawkan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan qalang Cibarbaran ga maki 1 kisya' glgan. spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨiβarβaran ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu kariŋ s~ɕi, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *,*** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ *%, truku *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨiβarβaran ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiβarβaran ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiβarβaran ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiβarβaran ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiβarβaran ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨipawkan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan qalaŋ ʦ~ʨiβarβaran ɣa maki * kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan. s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Cibarbaran ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Karing Si, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,593 buwan, 4,544 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 11% kyan ku 514 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 89% kyan ku 4,030 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 9%, Truku 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cibarbaran hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Cibarbaran hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Cibarbaran hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cibarbaran hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cibarbaran hya' ga Cipawkan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan qalang Cibarbaran ga maki 1 kisya' glgan. spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨiβarβaran ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu kariŋ s~ɕi, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *,*** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ *%, truku *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨiβarβaran ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiβarβaran ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiβarβaran ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiβarβaran ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiβarβaran ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨipawkan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan qalaŋ ʦ~ʨiβarβaran ɣa maki * kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan. s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
